description: Accounting class library — customers, invoices, products, payments, balances, and charge workflows. A complete domain model demonstrating relations, multi-currency, composite keys, and provider integration.

classes.name: Customer
classes.description: Customer/client account with balances, wallets, and service history

classes.name: Invoice
classes.description: Document header — invoices, receipts, credit notes. Composite key: docType/docID

classes.name: Invoice Line
classes.description: Document line item. Composite key: docType+docID+lineID

classes.name: Ledger Entry
classes.description: Balance/movement entry for customer accounting. Multi-currency support.

classes.name: Wallet
classes.description: Customer payment method — credit cards, IBANs, wire transfer details

classes.name: Balance
classes.description: Customer balance by year and currency

classes.name: Charge Log
classes.description: Charge execution log entry — provider responses and transaction status

classes.name: Service Product
classes.description: Service-specific product instance linked to a customer subscription

notes.composite_keys: Invoices and lines use composite keys (docType+docID, docType+docID+lineID) rather than single IDs.
notes.multi_currency: Three currency layers: local currency, user/customer currency, and system currency. Ledger entries track all three.
notes.provider_integration: Each class references a crud_provider instance for external API integration. Provider IDs follow the pattern acc_{class}_crud.
